历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 19988 → 21338 → 19897 → 22856 → 26228, showing an overall backward trend, especially accelerating in the last two years: 2024 moved back about 3000 places compared to 2023, and 2025 moved back another 3400 places compared to 2024, with a baseline of about 26228 in 2025; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for Physics Category were 98, 101, 101, 104, and 126 respectively, with a gradual small expansion; the 2026 plan is 122, a reduction of about 3.2% from 2025's 126, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 40th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 38-40 range in recent years, with comprehensive strength at the upper-middle level nationally.
4. [Reputation Heat] The 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, mainly due to humanities events such as graduates thanking the security department for allowing a scrap collector to enter the school, which may increase application attention; Douyin heat ranking is 53rd (relatively hot), with average short video exposure; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Ecology A+, Grass Science A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-, a total of 5 A- and above disciplines, among which Ecology and Grass Science are at the top level, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to social heat, matching well with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors; the number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 436 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Lanzhou University is located in Gansu, far from Guangdong, requiring adaptation to climate and lifestyle differences for cross-province study, which may suppress some Guangdong examinees' willingness to apply; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong is about 3%-4%, at a lower-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline of 26228, a 2026 enrollment reduction of about 3.2% (easing competition), a provincial Physics Category examinee increase of about 3.6% (intensifying competition), and a relatively positive reputation (attracting more applications), the reduction and examinee increase offset each other, with the positive reputation slightly prevailing; the ranking is expected to move forward slightly (decrease in number) compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 25928, with a range of 25428-26428.

- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 25428-26428, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Physics, Nuclear Engineering, Chemistry) as main choices, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mathematics) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Environmental, Business Administration, Biological Sciences) as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 25428), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 4085 → 4148 → 4945 → 4024 → 5069, showing significant fluctuations: it rose to 4945 in 2023, fell back to 4024 in 2024, and then rose again to 5069 in 2025. In the past three years, there has been an upward trend in rankings, with a baseline of approximately 5069 in 2025. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial enrollment plans for History Category were 40, 40, 39, 36, and 29 students respectively, showing a year-on-year decreasing trend. In 2026, the plan is for 32 students, an increase of about 10.3% compared to 29 students in 2025. This expansion will intensify competition (ranking numbers increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 40th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, placing the university in the upper-middle tier nationally. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is generally positive, with humanities-related events enhancing the school's image. Douyin popularity ranking is 53rd (relatively hot), with average short video exposure. No significant enrollment gaps have been recorded. Ecology A+, Grass Science A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-. Although the university is primarily focused on science, engineering, and agriculture, Geography A- has some relevance to History Category majors (such as the History Base Class). Overall, the academic strength still attracts liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in the province is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% compared to 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The 2025 History Category undergraduate batch cutoff score is 464, with little fluctuation in recent years. Lanzhou University is located in Gansu, far from Guangdong. Cross-province study requires adaptation to climate and lifestyle differences, which may somewhat suppress the willingness of some Guangdong candidates to apply. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong is about 3%–4%, which is below average.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5069, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 10.3% (intensifying competition), the increase in provincial History Category candidates of about 11.6% (significantly intensifying competition), and the generally positive reputation (attracting more applicants), the combined effect of expansion and candidate increase leads to notably intensified competition. The ranking is expected to move backward (number increases) from the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5484, with a range of 4984–5984.
